summary: Uninstall confirm dialog dead after an install: pressing UNINSTALL opens NO dialog. Renderer-side (backend route never hit, console clean, models/check 200). Suspect: install-driven renderList() leaves singleton _uninstallDialog Overlays/popup state stale -> .show() no-ops. Repro: install then uninstall right after. App-side. Found during MPI-97 verify.

Added NEXT-SESSION STATE handoff to brief: user resumes MPI-99 first next session; app left OPEN, log available (UTC content vs +1h file mtime), still connected to no-GPU Pod p3tayimai7po9t with 4 models installed, bug live (T2V UNINSTALL opens no dialog). Start with a DevTools probe: card.on(uninstall) firing vs _uninstallDialog.el.show() no-op. MPI-97/95 DONE+committed 2072dd3.

Picked up MPI-99. DevTools probe CONFIRMED cause B: UNINSTALL click reaches button (emit fires) but _uninstallDialog.el.show() is a no-op — no modal backdrop/wrapper portals to body. Singleton MpiModal _isShown stuck true (observer self-destruct false-fires during install-driven renderList). maturity in-progress.

ROOT CAUSE CONFIRMED by probe v4: emit(uninstall) FIRES (handler alive, calls _uninstallDialog.el.show()) but NO mpi-modal node ever appends to body -> _doShow never runs -> MpiModal el.show() early-returns on stuck _isShown=true. Desync state: _isShown=true while _backdrop=null, which NO existing reset reaches (ui:close-all-popups handler is _backdrop-guarded, so el.hide() never fires, never resets the flag). Cause: a prior _doShow set true, then backdrop removed WITHOUT el.hide() (install-driven renderList body churn / observer self-destruct / bare Overlays.reset). FIX (committed pending): MpiModal el.show() reconciles guard against real DOM — if (_isShown && !_backdrop) _isShown=false. App-side, no image.

FIXED + committed 3845756 (MpiModal.js only). MpiModal el.show() now reconciles the stuck-true _isShown guard against real DOM (if _isShown && !_backdrop -> _isShown=false). Verified: first uninstall opened the dialog after reload; root cause proven by probe v4 (emit fires, no modal append = guard early-return). Install->uninstall-right-after hard case blocked by a SEPARATE remote stale-_depJobs false-positive (instant fake INSTALLED) handed to MPI-100 agent (msg 36220820, acknowledged). maturity complete, status accepted.

REOPENED — commit 3845756 (_isShown && !_backdrop reconcile) did NOT fix it. User re-tested install->uninstall on fresh Pod qj7nx8bkdp6nhq / image v0.4.5-cpu (MPI-100 agent shipped ac1c308 + new image). Dialog STILL does not open. So stuck-_isShown was the wrong/incomplete root cause; need a sharper probe to see if _doShow even runs and why el.show() does not append the backdrop. maturity in-progress.

FIXED + VERIFIED LIVE (commit a28c7a8). Real cause: download:complete never clears the job from state.downloadJobs, so post-install renderList found a lingering complete job and wired pause/cancel instead of card.on(uninstall) -> Uninstall click emitted with no listener -> dialog never shown. Fix: installed-section gate now keys on genuinely-active states (downloading/paused/installing); terminal/complete takes the uninstall branch. User verified: install ILL Anime -> Uninstall -> confirm dialog opens. Also removed false Models-stored-locally footer (untrue remote) + orphan CSS. First hypothesis (MpiModal _isShown reconcile, 3845756) was wrong but harmless, left as safety net. maturity complete, status accepted.
Archived from done to tasks/_archived/MPI-99 (mpi-archive cleanup of oldest completed cards).
